sources: NITI Aayog — State Energy & Climate Index 2023
PFC Report on State Power Utilities 2022-23

installed_capacity_mw_2024.help: Total installed electricity generation capacity in MW. Includes all sources. Source: CEA 2024.

renewable_capacity_mw_2024.help: Renewable energy installed capacity (wind + solar + small hydro + biomass). Source: MNRE 2024.

renewable_pct_of_total_2024.help: Renewable energy as % of total installed capacity. Rajasthan leads; TN, KA, AP form a strong southern cluster. Source: CEA + MNRE 2024.

atc_loss_pct_2023.help: AT&C (Aggregate Technical & Commercial) Losses %. Combines technical losses in transmission/distribution with revenue collection shortfalls. Lower is better. National average ~16%. Source: PFC 2022-23.

peak_deficit_pct_2024.help: Peak demand deficit (supply gap at peak hours) as % of peak demand. Near zero means reliable supply. Source: CEA 2024.

per_capita_consumption_kwh_2023.help: Per capita electricity consumption in kWh/year. Higher reflects industrialisation + household usage. National avg 1255 kWh. Source: CEA 2023-24.

domestic_tariff_per_unit_2024.note: 0-100 units slab (most populated segment). TN = free up to 100 units. AP and TG have low rate for first 100-200 units. Source: State SERC tariff orders 2024.

agricultural_tariff_per_unit_2024.note: Agricultural tariff per unit. Most states offer free or highly subsidised power to farmers. Source: State SERC tariff orders 2024.

commercial_tariff_per_unit_2024.note: Commercial category (LT) per unit rate. Commercial consumers cross-subsidise domestic + agricultural. Source: SERC tariff orders 2024.

industrial_tariff_ht_per_unit_2024.note: HT industrial tariff per unit. Lower industrial tariff attracts manufacturing investment. Source: SERC orders 2024.

utility_annual_loss_cr_2023.note: Negative = profit. UP's losses are highest nationally. Gujarat's DISCOM is profit-making. Source: PFC 2022-23.

utility_accumulated_loss_cr_2023.note: Total accumulated losses of state power utilities. Gujarat has cleared losses. UP is worst nationally. Source: PFC 2022-23.

solar_capacity_mw_2024.help: Utility + rooftop solar capacity in MW. Rajasthan leads in utility solar. TN leads in rooftop solar. Source: MNRE 2024.

wind_capacity_mw_2024.help: Wind energy installed capacity. TN was India's wind pioneer. Source: MNRE 2024.

niti_energy_index_rank_2023.help: NITI Aayog State Energy & Climate Index rank. Lower rank = better performance across 6 dimensions. Source: SECI 2023.

subsidy_burden_cr_2023.help: Total electricity subsidy paid by state government (agricultural free power + domestic cross-subsidy + direct transfers). Source: State budgets 2023-24.

smart_meter_pct_installed.help: Smart meters installed as % of total connections. Critical for reducing AT&C losses. Source: MoP Smart Meter Dashboard 2024.
